---
description: "Use when: user says scope refresh, big-picture reminder, alignment check, or references PROJECT_SCOPE.md."
---
When invoked, do this before implementation:

1. Read PROJECT_SCOPE.md.
2. Restate mission, non-negotiables, and scope boundaries.
3. Identify any conflict between the user request and scope constraints.
4. Propose the minimum set of edits/commands that satisfy both request and constraints.

If scope details are missing, ask targeted clarification questions before coding.
